# CoSec Wiki

> RBAC-based and Policy-based Multi-Tenant Reactive Security Framework. This wiki provides comprehensive documentation for the CoSec security framework.

## Onboarding

- onboarding/index.md - Onboarding guide index
- onboarding/contributor.md - Contributor guide
- onboarding/staff-engineer.md - Staff engineer guide
- onboarding/executive.md - Executive guide
- onboarding/product-manager.md - Product manager guide

## Getting Started

- getting-started/overview.md - CoSec overview, features, comparison
- getting-started/quick-start.md - Step-by-step integration guide
- getting-started/configuration.md - Configuration properties reference
- getting-started/policy-authoring.md - JSON policy authoring guide

## Architecture

- deep-dive/architecture/module-dependency.md - Module structure and dependencies
- deep-dive/architecture/security-model.md - Security model and policy design
- deep-dive/architecture/reactive-design.md - Reactive programming with Project Reactor
- deep-dive/architecture/multi-tenancy.md - Multi-tenant architecture

## Authentication

- deep-dive/authentication/authentication-system.md - Authentication system architecture
- deep-dive/authentication/jwt-integration.md - JWT token handling
- deep-dive/authentication/social-authentication.md - OAuth social authentication
- deep-dive/authentication/token-management.md - Token lifecycle management

## Authorization

- deep-dive/authorization/authorization-flow.md - Authorization pipeline
- deep-dive/authorization/policy-evaluation.md - Policy evaluation algorithm
- deep-dive/authorization/action-matchers.md - Action matcher SPI
- deep-dive/authorization/condition-matchers.md - Condition matcher SPI
- deep-dive/authorization/permissions-roles.md - RBAC permission model

## Integrations

- deep-dive/integrations/spring-webflux.md - WebFlux integration
- deep-dive/integrations/spring-webmvc.md - WebMvc integration
- deep-dive/integrations/spring-cloud-gateway.md - Spring Cloud Gateway integration
- deep-dive/integrations/redis-caching.md - Redis caching via CoCache
- deep-dive/integrations/opentelemetry.md - OpenTelemetry tracing
- deep-dive/integrations/openapi.md - OpenAPI/Swagger integration
- deep-dive/integrations/ip-geolocation.md - IP geolocation enrichment

## Extending CoSec

- deep-dive/extending/custom-matchers.md - Custom matcher SPI guide
- deep-dive/extending/auto-configuration.md - Auto-configuration internals

## Operations

- deep-dive/operations/deployment.md - Deployment guide (Docker, K8s)
- deep-dive/operations/testing.md - Testing guide
- deep-dive/operations/performance.md - Performance and benchmarks

## Optional

- index.md - Wiki landing page
- zh/index.md - Chinese landing page
